summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V7 features: Risk Analytics page, AI Market Brief widget on Dashboard, route/navigation updates, and mobile responsiveness. All 10 requested test scenarios passed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

passed_tests: 1. Risk Analytics page loads at /risk-analytics with VaR cards, risk metrics, stress tests, radar chart, and return distribution histogram - PASSED
2. AI Market Brief card appears on Dashboard showing headline, body text, and market snapshot badges (10Y, Slope, VIX, NORMAL) - PASSED
3. Navigation menu in Dashboard has 'Risk Analytics' option with data-testid='risk-analytics-nav' that links to /risk-analytics - PASSED
4. Risk Analytics page has back button (data-testid='back-btn') that navigates to /dashboard - PASSED
5. Risk Analytics page refresh button (data-testid='refresh-btn') works and reloads data - PASSED
6. GET /api/risk-analytics returns proper JSON with var, metrics, stress_tests, concentration, risk_distribution, return_distribution - PASSED
7. GET /api/ai-brief returns proper JSON with date, headline, body, market_snapshot, ai_generated - PASSED
8. Dashboard still renders bond analytics panel, WS market data, execution logs - PASSED
9. Mobile responsive: social page leaderboard top 3 uses responsive grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3) - PASSED
10. Mobile responsive: social page profile stats uses responsive grid (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: RiskAnalyticsPage.jsx correctly implements all required components: VaR cards (5 metrics), risk metrics (6 cards), stress tests (8 scenarios with severity badges), radar chart for risk decomposition, and bar chart histogram for return distribution
Dashboard.jsx properly integrates AI Brief card with GPT-5.2 badge, headline, body text, and market snapshot badges
App.js correctly adds /risk-analytics route with ProtectedRoute wrapper
RiskAnalyticsService computes comprehensive risk metrics including VaR (historical + parametric), CVaR, Sharpe/Sortino ratios, max drawdown, and stress test scenarios
AIBriefService generates daily market briefs using GPT-5.2 with caching (one brief per day) and fallback to rule-based generation
SocialPage.jsx has correct responsive grid classes: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 for top 3 leaderboard, grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 for profile stats
context_for_next_testing_agent: V7 features fully tested and working: (1) Risk Analytics page at /risk-analytics with VaR cards (5 metrics: historical 95/99, parametric 95/99, CVaR 95), risk metrics (6 cards: Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, Annual Vol, Beta, Portfolio Value), stress tests (8 scenarios with CRITICAL/HIGH/MODERATE/LOW severity badges), radar chart for risk decomposition (5 categories: interest_rate, credit, liquidity, market, operational), and bar chart histogram for return distribution. (2) AI Market Brief card on Dashboard showing GPT-5.2 generated headline, body text, and market snapshot badges (10Y yield, slope, VIX, curve signal). (3) Navigation: Dashboard dropdown has 'Risk Analytics' nav item with data-testid='risk-analytics-nav'. Risk Analytics page has back button (data-testid='back-btn') and refresh button (data-testid='refresh-btn'). (4) Mobile responsiveness verified on SocialPage: top 3 leaderboard uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3, profile stats uses grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4. All APIs use real yfinance data and GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key.
